# Java 21 Upgrade Plan

## Overview
This plan upgrades the PhotoAlbum-Java application to Java 21 LTS, ensuring compatibility with the latest long-term support version of Java.

## Objectives
- Upgrade JDK to version 21
- Update build configuration for Java 21 compatibility
- Migrate any deprecated APIs to their modern equivalents
- Update dependencies to Java 21 compatible versions
- Ensure application builds and tests pass successfully

## Tasks
See `tasks.json` for the detailed task breakdown and execution tracking.

## Success Criteria
- Project compiles successfully with Java 21
- All existing unit tests pass
- No use of deprecated APIs or features removed in Java 21
